history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I should not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, and a safe path is to go down first. To face down from right, I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, while the lava at row 02 column C is to my right. Moving forward progresses toward the goal at row 04 column D without stepping onto lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe. From there I can continue toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C and row 02 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D, but moving forward would take me into a wall. To reach the goal safely, I should first turn right to face the open path toward column C and D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left (`<`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, so I need to face right. From left to right, the shortest safe change is to turn around with two right turns, but since I can only do one action now, I should first turn right to face up. This keeps me safe and sets up movement toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would go to row 03 column B, which is safe but does not move directly toward the goal. To reach the goal efficiently, I should turn right to face east toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell immediately to my right at row 04 column C is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward safely. I should avoid lava and choose a safe move first. Turning left will face me up toward a safe floor cell at row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell in between at row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move directly right. The safe path is to move up into row 03 column B, then navigate around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column B is safe, so moving forward brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would hit a wall, so I need to turn right to face east toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I should not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to go down first. From facing right, turning clockwise will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe and moves me closer to the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe. From there I can continue toward the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal O is at row 04 column D, but the cell in between at row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move directly right. The safe path is to move upward through the open cells and then approach the goal from above or the side. Since the cell above me at row 03 column B is safe, I should move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, so I need to move right twice. To face right from down, I should turn left first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
